title: Quick Ender Chest
description: Adds a command that when we type /ec in the chat an ender chest will open without getting it nor placing down. Useful or lazy peoples
body:
EC Mod is a **lightweight**, _server-side_ Fabric mod designed for Minecraft **1.21.11** that enhances player quality of life through a single, intuitive command: /ec.
Upon execution, the command provides instant access to the player's personal ender chest inventory, regardless of their current location or whether an ender chest block is present in the world. The inventory remains fully persistent and consistent with the standard ender chest mechanic — only the method of access is changed.
Key Features:

> - Instant ender chest access via /ec command #
> - No ender chest block or materials required #
> - Full inventory persistence — items are saved as normal #
> - Available to all players, no operator permissions required #
> - Zero client-side installation needed — fully server-side #
> - Lightweight with no configuration required #
> - Compatible with Minecraft 1.21.11 and Fabric Loader #

EC Mod is designed with server administrators in mind. Simply install the mod on your server and it works immediately — no setup, no configuration files, and no impact on server performance. Players on vanilla clients can use the command **without any additional steps.**
